title: Calicut University Time Table 2026 Out

detail.title: Calicut University Time Table 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Calicut University Time Table 2026 has been released for First Semester B.Voc CUFYVP Regular Examinations November 2025. Download revised Major, Minor and General Foundation course timetable PDF from pareekshabhavan.uoc.ac.in.

content.text: Calicut University has officially released the Revised Time Table 2026 for First Semester B.Voc. (CUFYVP) Regular Examinations November 2025 for 2025 admission candidates of affiliated colleges. The revised timetables are available for Major Courses, Minor Courses, and General Foundation Courses. Students can download the official Calicut University Time Table 2026 PDF from the Pareeksha Bhavan portal.
Direct Link to Download Calicut University Time Table 2026

links.text: Direct Link to Download Calicut University Time Table 2026

rows: First Semester B.Voc CUFYVP Regular Examinations

sections.heading: Calicut University Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Calicut University has released revised timetables for B.Voc programmes under CUFYVP scheme. The schedules cover Major Courses, Minor Courses, and General Foundation Courses for First Semester Regular examinations November 2025.

sections.heading: How to Download Calicut University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can download the Calicut University Time Table 2026 from the official examination portal by following the steps given below:

items: Visit the official Pareeksha Bhavan website of Calicut University.
Go to the Time Table section on the homepage.
Look for the B.Voc CUFYVP First Semester November 2025 revised timetable links.
Click on the relevant Major / Minor / General Foundation Course timetable.
The PDF will open. Download and save the file.
Take a printout for easy reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Note: Always refer to the official revised timetable and check all dates and instructions carefully before the examinations.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Calicut University Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Calicut University Time Table 2026 contains all essential information for students. The key details mentioned in the timetable are:

items: Programme name and semester
Examination date and day
Subject name with paper code
Session timing
Important instructions and revised schedule notes.

sections.heading: Calicut University Time Table 2026 Important Links

items: Official Time Table Portal: Click Here
Official Website: Click Here
